case_title: ELSTON, SUZANNE VS PACIFIC GAS & ELECTRIC

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS & ELECTRIC
